pageContext.name: Spider-Verse Lunar New Year (Connecting Variant Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Spider-Verse Lunar New Year (Connecting Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Featuring a connected Spider-Verse in a skyscraper-like format, this generously sized artwork was created by the acclaimed artist Jie Yuan. Bringing together a beautifully collected web of characters, this print is a must-have for fans of all things Spidey! Miles Morales, Gwen Stacy, The Amazing Spider-Man, Silk, and many more high-flying heroes abound!  Limited to 200 pieces, be sure to add this exciting Spider-art to your Marvel gallery today!
